Page.title: Page
Page.description: Represents a website page with dynamic draft and published contents.

route.description: The URL route path of the page (e.g. 'home', 'mission_vision', etc).

title.description: The display title of the page.

isCustom.description: True if the page is a user-added custom content page.

status.description: The publishing lifecycle status of this page.

publishedContent.description: The currently live-published content sections data structure.

draftContent.description: The workspace draft content sections data structure currently in editing.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this page document was last modified.

updatedBy.description: User UID who made the last change.

Image.title: Image
Image.description: Represents an uploaded CMS media asset.

url.description: Direct URL to access the uploaded image.

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded image file.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the image was uploaded.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Allowlists emails for CMS administrator access control.

email.description: The email address of the administrator.

/pages/{pageId}.description: Stores the dynamic draft and published content layouts of website pages.

/images/{imageId}.description: Stores catalog references to uploaded media assets.
